meta.title: SkyBlock
meta.author: UrGoNeLoL
pages:
Welcome to SkyBlock!

This is a guide to teach you how to play skyblock.

Getting Started

Type /island to warp to your own island. All you start with is a small island with one tree and a chest with some key items. Do not lose these, else you must restart you island.

The goal is to build an island where you can live.

Building Materials

First of all you need building materials to build your island. Use the bucket of lava and the block of ice to create a cobblestonegenerator as shown on the skyblock spawn. This cobblestone is your key item to build whatever you want.
The possibilities are endless. build farms and complete the challenges. Alone or with your friends!

Index

Getting Started

Type / island to warp to your own island. All you start with is a small island in the sky with a tree and a chest with some key items. Do not lose these unless you want to have to restart.

The goal is to build an island where you'll live
Building Materials

First of all you need materials to build you island. Use the bucket of lava and the block of ice to create a cobblestonegenerator as shown on the SkyBlock spawn. This cobblestone is the key item to build whatever you want.
List of Commands

/island help : shows you all the commands you might need to get around.
